Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Zhongbo Technology Development Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the system-level multi-million capital deconstruction and the '1-employee HVAC/fire engineering subcontractor' physical demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Zhongbo Technology Development,' was rigidly categorized into 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing' by the official system. Its business license, in later amendments (general items), frantically piled up cutting-edge manufacturing terminology: 'AI hardware sales, industrial automatic control system device manufacturing, computer peripheral equipment manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly penetrated this highly sci-fi facade, grasping its two fatal flaws: first, although the registered capital reaches the multi-million level (12 million), the paid-in capital is only 200,000 RMB! Second, the insured headcount is a pitiful 1 person! The logical deduction instantly turned into a satirical play on commercial packaging: in a small cubicle within the Minzu Industrial Park, the boss became the sole 'bare commander,' holding 200,000 RMB, claiming to have built manufacturing plants for 'AI hardware' and 'industrial control systems'? The probe mercilessly deleted all the 'manufacturing, AI' buzzwords used in the latter half of the license to chase trends and inflate value, locking onto the true money-making core business in the first half (permitted items): 'construction engineering, electromechanical engineering, fire engineering construction; central air conditioning, refrigeration equipment installation.' The truth is glaringly naked and strongly features characteristics of the Chinese engineering circles: this is a 100% pure 1-Employee HVAC, Fire & Electromechanical Subcontractor Shell operating out of an industrial park. The boss is highly likely a veteran engineering broker, spending 200k to set up a shell with a multi-million registered capital to appear formidable during bidding. Working alone in the industrial park, upon receiving orders for central air conditioning installation, building fire engineering, or electromechanical construction, they purchase the equipment and subcontract the work to external construction teams. The official 'Electrical Machinery Manufacturing Entity' tag is a complete failure of algorithms when faced with engineering bidding shell companies.
